description: Ranks brands by veteran-flagged passenger cars as a percentage of their current registered fleet. Based on the KoeretoejOplysningVeteranKoeretoejOriginal registry flag, not a derived age calculation. Requires at least 100 total current cars per brand. Use for which brands have the most veteran cars relative to their fleet.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS total_cars = COUNT(*), veteran_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningVeteranKoeretoejOriginal == TRUE BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE total_cars >= 100 AND veteran_cars > 0 | EVAL veteran_share_pct = ROUND(veteran_cars * 100.0 / total_cars, 2) | SORT veteran_share_pct DESC | LIMIT 25
